summary: Lead Timeline/Milestone Business Logic Fix verified successfully. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI correctly displays 'Lead Allocated' as starting stage with auto-completion, 'BC Call Done' as pending (not auto-completed), and correct TAT-based expected dates.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Timeline/Milestone business logic fix is fully verified. Key changes: 1) Leads now start at 'Lead Allocated' stage (not 'BC Call Done'), 2) Only 'Lead Allocated' is auto-completed on creation, 3) 'BC Call Done' requires manual completion by designer (24h TAT), 4) 'First BOQ Sent' requires manual completion (48h TAT after BC Call). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_lead_timeline_milestone.py can be reused for regression testing.
